===Pokémon Zensho===
[[File:Lt Surge Zensho.png|thumb|200px|Lt. Surge in Pokémon Zensho]]
Lt. Surge first appeared in [[PZ04]] and challenged {{Zensho|Satoshi}} to a Gym battle. Satoshi eventually defeated his {{p|Electabuzz}} by tying it up with the barbed-wire fence surrounding the battlefield, earning Satoshi the Thunder Badge. Afterwards, it was revealed that Lt. Surge was a friend of the captain of the [[S.S. Anne]], who came to congratulate Satoshi of his victory and gave him {{HM|01|Cut}}.
